emails.subject: Re: Supply Bought by NPC
emails.body: This 250R/245D should be part of our daily demand for COH 8-35from ENA, not in addition to. ie 750/d demand 245(AGG POOL) 505( sto+ IPP) Also please pull directly from Agg Pool to transport K, not through IPP Pool as it may get cut Chris Germany@ECT 10/31/2000 10:51 AM
